creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Yonas Yanfa from comment #0)

Hi Yonas,


Did you try to build it without these options?

The build depends on the python3 executable.

And it looks for the xcb* libraries:

defaultlibs" "-fstack-protector-strong"
  = note: ld: error: unable to find library -lxcb
          ld: error: unable to find library -lxcb-render
          ld: error: unable to find library -lxcb-shape
          ld: error: unable to find library -lxcb-xfixes
          cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)



Yuri
